Map of CVE to Advisory/Alert

Map of CVE to Advisory/Alert

 

The following table, updated to include the April 15, 2025 Critical Patch Update, maps CVEs to specific Critical Patch Update Advisories or Security alerts for CVEs > CVE-2020-0000.

CVEs greater than CVE-2015-0000 and less than CVE-2020-0000 can be found at this archive page.

Oracle recommends that customers always apply the latest Critical Patch Update for protection against known vulnerabilities.
